name: Hasib Ahmad Bhuyan
role: Backend Engineer & Tech Lead — Agentic AI & Automation
summary: Backend Engineer and Tech Lead specialising in scalable API platforms, microservices, and production-grade agentic AI systems. I build multi-agent workflows, LLM orchestration pipelines, and RAG-powered tools that turn AI capabilities into real business automation — in Python (Django, FastAPI) and Go (Fiber). I integrate and self-host open-source AI infrastructure, including local Hermes LLM deployments, into production social and marketing automation. I lead cross-functional teams, own architecture decisions, and ship at speed.
